title: A battle of wits
setting: Among close friends, a fast-paced game of puns and comebacks breaks out. The skill: think in layers and volley instantly.

steps.speaker: Roberto
steps.es: Maje, vos sos como el café: mejor con leche y sin amargura.
steps.en: Dude, you're like coffee: better with milk and without bitterness.

options.es: Y vos como el azúcar: dulce pero malo en exceso.
options.en: And you're like sugar: sweet but bad in excess.
options.feedback: You extended his metaphor and flipped it back — that's high-level improvised wordplay. Brilliant.
Appreciating it is fine, but the game is to volley. Fire one back!
At this level you CAN get it — the milk/bitterness layering is the joke. Stay in the game.

steps.speaker: Roberto
steps.es: ¡Uy! Te las traés. A ver si seguís el ritmo.
steps.en: Whoa! You've got it in you. Let's see if you keep the pace.

options.es: Tranquilo, que el que ríe último, ríe mejor.
options.en: Relax, he who laughs last, laughs best.
options.feedback: Dropping a proverb mid-banter as a comeback — layered and witty. Native-level play.

options.en: Go on, throw what you've got.
options.feedback: Confident and casual — accepting the challenge with swagger. Perfect energy.
Bowing out early cuts the fun. You're holding your own — keep going!

steps.speaker: Roberto
steps.es: Este chele ya no se deja. ¡Está deacachimba!
steps.en: This foreigner doesn't back down anymore. He's awesome!

options.es: Es que con vos de rival, uno aprende a la fuerza.
options.en: It's that with you as a rival, one learns by force.
options.feedback: A compliment disguised as a jab — peak banter. You're thinking in two layers at once.

options.en: Years of putting up with you leave something, no?
options.feedback: Cheeky and affectionate — the perfect register among old friends. Effortless.
Too earnest for the moment — the bit's still flying. Keep playing!

steps.speaker: Roberto
steps.es: Jajaja, ya sos más nica que el gallo pinto, maje.
steps.en: Hahaha, you're more Nica than gallo pinto now, dude.

options.es: Y con más sabor, modestia aparte.
options.en: And with more flavor, modesty aside.
options.feedback: You extended the food metaphor with a wink — the comedic button on the whole exchange. Masterful.

options.es: No hay mayor honor que ese, hermano.
options.en: There's no greater honor than that, brother.
options.feedback: Warm sincerity landing after all the jokes — a perfect tonal shift to close on.
Ending it flatly wastes a great setup. Land one more line, then bask in it.
